# Deployment Template

## 1. Tujuan Deployment

Jelaskan target environment dan tujuan deployment.

## 2. Prasyarat

- runtime
- environment variables
- server access
- database

## 3. Langkah Build

1. Install dependencies
2. Run tests
3. Build artefact
4. Start application

## 4. Topologi Deploy

- local
- staging
- production

## 5. Keamanan

- secret handling
- HTTPS
- access control

## 6. Checklist Setelah Deploy

- login
- dashboard
- API
- error log
